title: Ikonnikovia kaufmanniana
uses: Ikonnikovia kaufmanniana, a plant native to the Tibetan Plateau, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The plant has also been used to treat various health conditions, including fever and respiratory issues. taxonomy: Ikonnikovia kaufmanniana is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Saxifragaceae. It is a perennial plant native to China and the Himalayas. Within the Saxifragaceae family, Ikonnikovia kaufmanniana is classified in the genus Ikonnikovia. The classification of Ikonnikovia kaufmanniana is further divided into various taxonomic ranks, including kingdom, phylum, class, order, and family. The specific classification of Ikonnikovia kaufmanniana is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Saxifragales, family Saxifragaceae, genus Ikonnikovia, species I. kaufmanniana.
